---
id: search-properties
title: "Search properties with filters"
description: "Search holiday rental properties by location, dates, guest count, and amenities. Returns paginated results with property summaries including title, price, images, and availability. Use this as the starting point for any property discovery flow."
sidebar_label: "Search properties with filters"
hide_title: true
hide_table_of_contents: true
api: 
sidebar_class_name: "get api-method"
info_path: docs/api/booking-brain-developer-api
custom_edit_url: null
---

  as={"h1"}

  children={"Search properties with filters"}
>
</Heading>

<MethodEndpoint
  method={"get"}
  path={"/developer/search"}
  context={"endpoint"}
>
  
</MethodEndpoint>



Search holiday rental properties by location, dates, guest count, and amenities. Returns paginated results with property summaries including title, price, images, and availability. Use this as the starting point for any property discovery flow.

  as={"h2"}
